# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- Always add a 'Last Edit:' note at the top of any created/edited/modified pages.
- Update `CHANGELOG.md` and `README.md` if necessary after edits/modifications.

## Project Guidelines
- User expects me to recognize when they open MyDigitalClock and proceed without repeating instructions to open it.
- User wants to keep the plan to combine MyDigitalClock, WeatherFusion Pro, and TempestDisplay on the back burner for later
